ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activity_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine the record belongs to */,
  "nb_sleeping" INTEGER /* Number of machines in the sleeping state */,
  "nb_switching_on" INTEGER /* Number of machines switching on */,
  "nb_switching_off" INTEGER /* Number of machines switching off */,
  "nb_idle" INTEGER /* Number of machines in the idle state */,
  "nb_computing" INTEGER /* Number of machines in the computing state */,
  "total_power_consumption" REAL /* Total power consumption of the machines */,
  "avg_cpu_temperature" REAL /* Average CPU temperature of the machines */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_records_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the machine (e.g., Data Center A, Office B) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the machine (e.g., Server, Workstation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the machine (e.g., Active, Maintenance) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the machine */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the machine */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES machine_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES machine_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine type */,
  "cpu_architecture" TEXT /* CPU architecture of the machine type (e.g., x86, ARM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., IT Operations, System Admin, Data Analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user role (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the alert is associated with */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Performance, Maintenance) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., CPU Usage, Memory Usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., %, MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_name FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name") REFERENCES performance_metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
